VC2: Addresses genito-urinary issues, urinary retention, and menstrual irregularities.
VC3: Treats genito-urinary disorders, cystitis, and damp-heat in the genital area. Front-Mu of Bladder.
VC4: Nourishes Kidney Qi, tonifies original Qi, and treats reproductive/urinary issues. Front-Mu of Small Intestine.
VC5: Regulates the Water Passages and treats edema, urinary issues, and abdominal pain.
VC6: Known as 'Sea of Qi'. Tonifies Qi and Yang, treats fatigue, and regulates lower jiao.
VC7: Regulates menstruation and treats abdominal pain and urogenital issues.
VC8: Located at the umbilicus. Rescues Yang, treats extreme fatigue and chronic digestive issues.
VC9: Regulates the Water Passages and treats edema and abdominal distension.
VC10: Aids digestion and treats stomach pain, gas, and indigestion.
VC11: Strengthens the Spleen and Stomach, treats abdominal distension and vomiting.
VC12: Major point for digestive issues (reflux, gas, nausea). Tonifies Stomach/Spleen. Front-Mu of Stomach.
VC13: Regulates Heart Qi and treats reflux, nausea, and emotional anxiety.
VC14: Front-Mu of the Heart. Treats heart pain, palpitations, and mental/emotional issues.
VC15: Luo-Connecting of Ren. Calms the mind and treats chest pain and anxiety.
VC16: Unbinds the chest and treats local pain and cough.
VC17: Treats asthma, chest pain, palpitations, and anxiety. Influential point of Qi.
VC18: Unbinds the chest and treats local pain and difficulty swallowing.
VC19: Treats cough, asthma, and chest pain.
VC20: Unbinds the chest and treats cough and local pressure.
VC21: Treats cough, asthma, and difficulty swallowing.
VC22: Indicated for cough, asthma, sore throat, and 'plum pit' sensation in the throat.
VC23: Benefits the tongue and throat. Used for difficulty swallowing and speech issues.
VC24: Used for facial paralysis (Bell's palsy), dental pain, and dry mouth.
P1: Treats chest congestion, chronic cough, and breast disorders.
P2: Indicated for chest pain, palpitations, and local arm pain.
P3: Clears heat, treats heart pain, and addresses summer-heat digestive issues.
P4: Xi-Cleft point. Effective for acute heart pain, blood stagnation, and emotional trauma.
P5: Transforms phlegm, treats nausea, and regulates emotional mania/anxiety.
P6: Highly effective for nausea, motion sickness, anxiety, and insomnia. Luo-Connecting point.
P7: Clears Heart heat and calms the spirit. Used for insomnia and emotional distress.
P8: Addresses mental restlessness, mouth ulcers, and high blood pressure. Clears heart fire.
P9: Jing-Well point. Used to revive consciousness and clear heart fire.
P10: Clears heat and treats palm heat and local hand issues.
P11: Jing-Well point. Treats throat pain and clears heat.
IG1: Jing-Well point. Treats breast disorders, insufficient lactation, and mastitis.
IG2: Ying-Spring point. Treats ear problems, scapula pain, and local hand issues.
IG3: Shu-Stream point. Key for neck and back pain, and spinal well-being.
IG4: Yuan-Source point. Treats nasal obstruction, jaundice, and local wrist issues.
IG5: Jing-River point. Treats neck pain, jaw swelling, and wrist issues.
IG6: Xi-Cleft point. Benefits the eyes and treats shoulder/arm pain.
IG7: Luo-Connecting point. Calms the spirit and treats neck/arm pain.
IG8: He-Sea point. Clears heat and treats swelling of the neck and check.
IG9: Expels wind and treats shoulder and arm pain.
IG10: Benefits the shoulder and treats local stiffness/pain.
IG11: Mid-way through the scapula. Treats shoulder and upper back tension.
IG12: Expels wind and treats pain in the shoulder and arm.
IG13: Treats stiffness and pain in the shoulder and upper back.
IG14: Expels wind and cold, treats neck and shoulder pain.
IG15: Treats shoulder/neck stiffness and supports Lung function.
IG16: Benefits the throat and ears, treats neck pain.
IG17: Benefits the ears and jaw, treats local swelling/pain.
IG18: Treats facial paralysis, toothache, and sinus issues.
IG19: In front of the ear. Employed for ear disorders like tinnitus and jaw pain.
IG20: Treats nasal obstruction and sinus issues.
E1: Benefits the eyes, clears wind, and treats eyelid twitching.
E2: Eliminates wind and clears vision. Used for facial paralysis.
E3: Reduces facial swelling and relieves sinus congestion.
E4: Benefits the mouth and treats Bell's palsy or facial paralysis.
E5: Eliminates wind and treats jaw pain and facial swelling.
E6: Relieves TMJ and jaw pain. Used for dental issues.
E7: Best point for trigeminal neuralgia and jaw tension.
E8: Clears headaches (especially frontal) and relieves dizziness.
E9: Regulates Qi, benefits the throat, and stabilizes blood pressure.
E10: Benefits the throat and stops cough.
E11: Benefits the throat and unbinds the chest.
E12: Treats cough, asthma, and local neck/shoulder tension.
E13: Unbinds the chest and treats local pressure/pain.
E14: Unbinds the chest and treats local pain and cough.
E15: Treats chest pain and breast disorders.
E16: Treats breast pain and chest congestion.
E17: Located at the nipple (not for needling). Treats breast issues.
E18: Beneficial for breast disorders and unbinding the chest.
E19: Harmonizes the Stomach and treats reflux, gas, and nausea.
E20: Harmonizes the Middle Jiao and treats abdominal distension.
E21: Major point for digestive issues, nausea, and stomach pain.
E22: Treats abdominal pain, distension, and acute digestive issues.
E23: Treats abdominal pain and mental restlessness.
E24: Harmonizes the Stomach and treats abdominal pain.
E25: Regulates the large intestine, treats constipation and diarrhea. Front-Mu of Large Intestine.
E26: Treats abdominal pain and hernia issues.
E27: Benefits the Kidneys and treats abdominal pain and urogenital issues.
E28: Treats lower abdominal pain and urogenital disorders.
E29: Benefits the uterus and treats menstrual pain.
E30: Harmonizes the lower jiao and treats urogenital pain.
E31: Treats local pain in the thigh and hip.
E32: Expels wind and treats local leg pain.
E33: Treats local knee pain and leg weakness.
E34: Xi-Cleft point of the Stomach. Treats acute knee pain and gastric pain.
E35: Major point for knee pain and swelling.
E36: Major point for digestion, immunity, and longevity. Regulates Qi and Blood. Command point of abdomen.
E37: He-Sea point for Large Intestine. Treats diarrhea and abdominal pain.
E38: Indicated for shoulder pain/stiffness and lower leg weakness/atrophy.
E39: He-Sea point for Small Intestine. Treats lower abdominal pain.
E40: Major point for resolving phlegm. Also treats mental health conditions and asthma.
E41: Clears heat from the Stomach and treats ankle pain/weakness.
E42: Yuan-Source point. Strengthens the Spleen/Stomach and treats local foot pain.
E43: Shu-Stream point. Treats abdominal pain and swelling of the foot.
E44: Ying-Spring point. Clears Stomach heat and alleviates toothache/facial pain.
E45: Jing-Well point. Calms the mind and clears heat (e.g., toothache, epistaxis).
